title: PJM Solar Generation By Area JSON API
description:
Solar generation by Area in PJM on an hourly basis. Areas include *MIDATL*, *Other*, *RFC*, *RTO*, *South*, and *West*. The *Other* region contains external units as well as units for which the region/area is unknown.

Final data for this dataset is delayed by up to 4 months. Prior to updating with final data, PJM may provide both 0 and negative values.
